# Hith Anhydrite

**Summary**: Geological formation studied in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] studied the Hith Anhydrite

- [[2011-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2011]] used hith-anhydrite as the primary barrier for the proposed SCH design to ensure cement integrity and lateral separation.

- [[2024-hassan|Hassan, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- studied the Hith Anhydrite ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2024-hassan|Hassan, 2024]])
